changelog.title: Trailing stop tuning & limit extension enabled
changes: New: Limit extension enabled — take-profit extends up to 3× as winning trades trend further
Changed: Trail trigger tightened to 0.75× ATR (was 1.0×) — locks in profits sooner
Changed: Breakeven trigger at 0.4× ATR (was 0.5×) — faster stop-to-entry on fast moves
Changed: CAUTION size multiplier lifted to 0.5× flat (was 0.25× below 88% confidence)
Changed: Limit extension step reduced to 0.75× ATR for finer, more frequent extensions
Changed: Max limit extensions per position increased to 3 (was 2)

changelog.title: Cold start, blended confidence & startup cleanup
changes: Changed: COLD_START_BARS reduced from 6 to 2 — markets ready in ~10 min
New: Dashboard market boxes now show ML-blended confidence (not raw rules %)
New: ATR-scaled trailing stop triggers for all instruments
New: Nasdaq added to Yahoo OHLC pre-seeder for faster cold start
Fixed: Startup now kills stale processes and removes lock file automatically
New: Startup self-test suite runs on every launch

changelog.title: ML decisions, session whitelist & gap expiry
changes: New: ML decision log visible on dashboard
Fixed: gap_detected now clears after 12 bars
New: london_morning added to Nasdaq/Wall Street session whitelist
Fixed: Session summary MagicMock bug resolved
New: Stop Agent button with heartbeat-based shutdown
